title: A Strange Sea Near Jaya
description: On pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this part focuses on toward the knock up stream. The search for sky island becomes more concrete as the crew learns about unusual currents, salvage rivals, and the legends around Jaya.
scene: This scene belongs to the Toward the Knock Up Stream sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Mont Blanc Cricket, Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Alright, mates! Turn the rubber upwards!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: up, up, up into the sky!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Nor have I heard of one...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: What're those two up to now?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: There will always be an island.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What's she doing, opening that coffin...?

dialogue.speaker: Masira
dialogue.text: Can you figure something out from that?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You've got one macabre tastes, sister.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Whoa, you put it back together!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The holes here are artificial. Man-made, clearly.

dialogue.speaker: Shojo
dialogue.text: No, these holes are from surgery... "Trepanation."

summary: The search for sky island becomes more concrete as the crew learns about unusual currents, salvage rivals, and the legends around Jaya.
